utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present), transportation (present but flight details lack specific flights and exact costs; only estimated range and platforms), accommodation (present with types, night costs, and total accommodation cost), activities (present with names and costs), additional_services (present with descriptions but no costs; required format asks for costs), total_budget (present with estimated total and constraint). Fully specified check: Destination – OK. Travel_dates – OK (specific dates). Transportation – Not fully specified (needs flight details with costs; lacks exact flight details and concrete cost). Accommodation – Mostly specified (hotel selection with costs; types and costs given; acceptable). Activities – Specified with costs – OK. Additional_services – Not fully specified because it requires any extra services with costs; here no costs provided (one is “Complimentary” but not clearly costed, the other has no cost). Total_budget – Provided with estimated total – OK. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, total_budget = 5. Transportation and additional_services are not fully specified = 2 missing.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each item mentioned in the final package to the corresponding ground-truth item names and their ratings. Destination includes Prague, which has a direct entry. Transportation lists platforms but implies flights generally; no exact class/type chosen, so we cannot map platforms. Accommodation types exactly match Backpacker's Base and Eco Lodge. Activities list two items; Urban Photography Workshop and Bohemian Switzerland Nature Photography do not match any ground-truth activity names, so cannot be mapped. Additional services include a 'travel_readiness_program' not in ground truth; 'personalization' is descriptive only. Total budget is not a ground-truth item.
